title: Student login success and role redirect
description: Verify student can log in and land on student dashboard.

title: Invalid login shows inline error
description: Verify invalid credentials display login error feedback.

title: Student dashboard renders tabs and cards
description: Verify dashboard top-level sections render after login.
steps: Assert key cards and navigation tabs exist

title: Question bank search and sort interaction
description: Verify student can open question bank and use search/sort controls.
steps: Change sort option and assert list updates

title: Student profile settings open
description: Verify settings tab opens and password change form is reachable.
steps: Assert password change fields are present

title: Get started form validation
description: Verify get-started interest form blocks invalid required fields.
steps: Try submitting empty or invalid form fields

title: Student test series list loads
description: Verify test series tab opens and list/empty state is visible.
steps: Assert list of tests or explicit empty state appears
